title: GD Controller Report
description: Schema for the /gd controller run report produced after a full dispatch+review+gate cycle.

run_mode.description: Execution mode. 'fixture' runs are closure-ineligible and will be rejected by the validator.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the controller run started.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the controller run finished.

aggregate_path.description: Filesystem path to the cross-review aggregate JSON produced by this run.

manifest_path.description: Filesystem path to the dispatch manifest JSON used for this run.

primary_gate.description: Outcome of the primary (Claude self-review) gate.

verdict.description: Gate verdict string (e.g. APPROVED, REQUIRES_CHANGES, FAILED).

blocking.description: List of blocking finding IDs or descriptions from this gate.

secondary_gate.description: Outcome of the secondary (Codex cross-review) gate.

verdict.description: Gate verdict string (e.g. APPROVED, REQUIRES_CHANGES, FAILED).

blocking.description: List of blocking finding IDs or descriptions from this gate.

gate_consistent.description: True when primary and secondary gates agree on the final verdict.

dirty_detected.description: True when the controller detected uncommitted or unexpected filesystem changes during the run.

jobs.description: One entry per dispatched job in this controller run.

queue_job_id.description: Unique identifier for this job within the dispatch queue.

target_role.description: Role label for the review target (e.g. 'plan', 'code', 'execution').

primary_target.description: Filesystem path or identifier of the primary artifact being reviewed.

bridge_exit.description: Exit code returned by the Codex bridge process for this job.

bridge_stderr_path.description: Path to the file containing bridge stderr output, or null if none was captured.

raw_verdict.description: Raw verdict string extracted from the bridge output.

mapped_status.description: Normalized status after verdict mapping (e.g. approved, requires_changes, failed, degraded).

aggregate_bucket.description: Bucket name used when writing this job result into the cross-review aggregate.
